title: lipochaeta serrata
intro: Lipochaeta serrata, also known as Hawaiian mountain sawgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Lipochaeta serrata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in a carrier oil or solvent.
